char_overview: A half-underground firearms workshop. Cynical ex-狩灵协会3科 armorer who found more money outside the system.
char_looks: 176cm. Black hair slicked back Weathered face, dark brown eyes, crease between brows from years behind a loupe. Sardonic jaw. Oil-stained henley shirt with rolled sleeves, faded black jeans, worn work boots. Loupe pushed up on forehead. None.
char_flaws: Sleeps fine selling guns to killers; Charges extra to keep quiet.; Keeps a leather-bound ledger, only serial numbers, calibers, and prices, one name scratched out.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-着弹: Infuses completed firearms with a signature 灵力 imprint that records every shot fired. Allows 炼司 to track his weapons' usage remotely. Imprint is permanent and cannot be removed without destroying the firearm.
char_mission: Take commissions that pay well and interest him technically. Stay outside 狩灵协会3科's radar, visible enough to keep getting clients.
char_origin: Former 狩灵协会3科 armorer who quit when standardized pay met custom-work money. Established 白烟工坊 without 狩灵协会3科 certification. Its clients are 罪灵s, 游魂s, and 协会狩灵s paying cash under fake names.

char_relationships.烬: Client, built 轻语 to 烬's exact specifications over three months of clandestine meetings, never asked what the gun was for. The only name ever scratched out in his ledger is his.
char_relationships.狩灵协会3科: Former employer, left after realizing the money outside the system was better. Still uses 狩灵协会3科-grade tooling in his workshop. Good tools are good tools.
